## 🤔 What is Seedance 2.0?

**Seedance 2.0** is a video generation model developed by **ByteDance**. It is the industry's first model supporting **simultaneous quad-modal input** — image, video, audio, and text.

**Key Features:**
- 🎥 **Text-to-Video** — Generate videos from text descriptions
- 🖼️ **Image-to-Video** — Animate static images into dynamic videos
- 📹 **Video-to-Video** — Transform and extend existing videos
- 🎵 **Audio-Driven** — Generate videos driven by audio input
- 📐 **Up to 1080p resolution**, 4–15 seconds duration
- 🔊 **Auto dubbing & scoring** — Automatic voiceover and background music

### No. 1: Seedance 2.0: 15-Second Cinematic Japanese Romance Short Film

![中文](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-中文-red)
![Featured](https://img.shields.io/badge/⭐-Featured-gold)

#### 📖 Description

A highly detailed, 15-second multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0, designed to generate a cinematic, ultra-realistic Japanese high school pure love short film. The prompt specifies scene setting (empty classroom, warm golden sunlight, dust motes), camera movements, character consistency (no deformation/drift), subtle micro-expressions, synchronized breathing/lip movements, dialogue, and sound effects (cicadas, pen scratching, low-frequency heartbeat, soft piano). The narrative focuses on the intense, awkward, and intimate emotional tension between a girl writing and a boy secretly watching her, culminating in a shy confrontation.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
15-second cinematic Japanese drama pure love ambiguous short film, ultra-realistic quality, warm golden sunlight in an empty classroom in the afternoon, spilling through the blinds onto the side-by-side desks, fine dust motes slowly floating in the light beams, old wooden desks, extremely natural subtle movements, breathing, and eye tension, characters maintain consistent faces, clothing, and hairstyles throughout without deformation, drift, or artifacts, real slight chest rise and fall synchronized with breathing, shallow depth of field, creamy blurred background, warm film grain, 8K sharp, Japanese youth restrained heart-fluttering suffocating atmosphere.
0-4 seconds: Extremely slow push-in shot from a medium shot of the desktop to a close-up of the two people's side profiles sitting side-by-side. A pure girl in a summer school uniform is focused on writing notes with her head down, long black hair and stray hairs by her ears are gently lifted by a slight breeze, long eyelashes cast subtle shadows, skin is naturally pink and tender, a slight, unintentional upturn of the corner of her mouth in concentration, light and even breathing.
4-9 seconds: Switch to a close-up of the boy. His school uniform collar is slightly loose, he props his elbow on the desk and secretly turns his head to gaze at her, his eyes filled with gentle, restrained affection and tenderness, pupils slightly dilated, his Adam's apple gently rolls. Suddenly noticing her pen pause, he quickly and flusteredly turns his head to pretend to look at his own notes, his earlobes quickly turn slightly red, his fingertips tremble slightly as he grips the pen, occasionally glancing at her from under his bangs, his breathing is slightly disordered, and his lips are tightly pressed in an effort to remain calm.
9-15 seconds: Extreme close-up of both faces in the same frame, slow-motion eyes suddenly meet: the girl slowly turns her head, first showing a dazed surprise, then quickly and shyly lowers her head for 0.3 seconds, gently biting her lower lip, her cheeks and earlobes instantly bloom with cherry blossom pink, her moist eyelashes timidly look up to meet his gaze again, while softly and shyly whispering, "...What are you looking at?"; the boy freezes completely, his pupils dilate, and he is stunned for 0.4 seconds, then flusteredly and quietly stutters in response, "N-nothing...". The girl whispers even quieter, biting her lip and peeking at him again, continuing to whisper, "...Liar.". The boy pauses, then gently sighs and whispers, "...Just looking at you.", the corner of his mouth slowly curls up into a shy, gentle, crooked smile, fine lines appear at the corners of his eyes, and his breathing noticeably deepens. An invisible current seems to pull the ambiguous tension between their faces, sharing each other's breathing temperature, the background completely melts into layers of creamy, dreamy light spots, warm halos, and fine air particles.
Lip synchronization is natural and precise, emotional micro-tremors and breathing are synchronized, dialogue is low-energy whispering with a shy tone, natural short pauses between 200-400 milliseconds, the mouth only moves slightly when speaking, without exaggeration or robotic feel, perfect natural lip-sync and emotional authenticity.
Overall Sound Effects: Distant summer cicada chirping faintly, the soft scratching sound of the pen touching the paper, the almost inaudible low-frequency pulse of their heartbeats, finally fading into a very light, airy piano. The dialogue is completely naturally integrated into the scene as whispers, the girl's voice is soft and shy, the boy transitions from flustered stuttering to gentle.
Character identity is maintained throughout, real subtle head tilts, eye movements, and breathing synchronization, no text, watermarks, or subtitles, pure Japanese style youth secret crush heart-fluttering suspense.
```

### No. 2: Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy Video Prompt

![中文](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-中文-red)
![Featured](https://img.shields.io/badge/⭐-Featured-gold)

#### 📖 Description

A detailed, multi-scene video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, designed to create a Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy film. The prompt specifies style, resolution (8K), rendering engine (Unreal Engine 5), duration (15 seconds), and three distinct camera/action sequences involving a model in liquid blue-and-white porcelain that shatters into ink-wash swallows, culminating in a 3D fluid ink vortex.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
[Style] Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy blockbuster, 8K ultra-clear, Photorealistic, High-fashion Editorial Style, Unreal Engine 5 fluid rendering, visual illusion. [Duration] 15 seconds. [Scene] An endless, real-life Salar de Uyuni (Sky Mirror) salt flat. The sky is filled with oppressive dark clouds, and the ground perfectly reflects everything like a mirror, with the overall picture presenting a minimalist, cool tone. [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Haute Couture Entrance and Porcelain Skin. Camera position: Extremely low-angle upward shot, ultra-telephoto lens zoom-in. Action: An Asian female model with a highly recognizable, high-fashion face walks coolly on the water surface. Effect: She is wearing not fabric, but a long dress made of flowing, real Liquid Blue-and-White Porcelain. As she walks, the skirt makes a crisp collision sound like real ceramic, with a flowing luster on the surface. The traditional blue-and-white patterns move across the white porcelain-textured skirt as if alive. [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Physical Shattering and Ink-wash Descent. Camera position: Extreme close-up of the face, focus rapidly pulls back. Action: The model suddenly stops, stares coldly at the camera, and snaps her fingers crisply. Effect: The moment the fingers snap, her blue-and-white porcelain dress does not fall, but instantly explodes into thousands of extremely photorealistic Ink-wash Swallows. These swallows carry real water droplets and ink marks, dragging black fluid afterimages in the air, spinning frantically around her. [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Dimensional Dissolution and Abyss Reflection. Camera position: High-altitude overhead shot, camera rapidly rotates and descends. Action: The swarm of ink-wash swallows plunges into the mirrored lake water beneath the model's feet. Effect: The surface tension of the originally solid salt lake instantly disappears. The entire extremely realistic world begins to violently bleed and dissolve like concentrated ink dropped into clear water. The real dark clouds and the model's figure transform entirely into an extremely grand 3D Fluid Ink Vortex, completely swallowing the camera into a black and white interwoven abyss.
```

### No. 3: Modern Rural Aesthetics Healing Short Film Video Prompt

![中文](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-中文-red)
![Featured](https://img.shields.io/badge/⭐-Featured-gold)

#### 📖 Description

A detailed, three-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a healing, cinematic short film in the Modern Rural Aesthetics style. It specifies the style (Cinematic Commercial, 4K/8K, Extreme Macro, natural light, ASMR), the setting (a modern open kitchen with a garden view), the character (a focused creator in linen), and specific actions for three scenes: picking a tomato, precise cutting, and a quiet moment of eating.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
[Style]
Modern Rural Aesthetics, Cinematic Commercial quality, shot with Sony A7S3/cinema camera, 4K/8K ultra-clear, Extreme Macro, natural transparent lighting, healing ASMR, no historical costume drama feel.

[Scene]
A well-maintained modern farmhouse open kitchen, background is a lush vegetable garden, bright sunshine.

[Character]
Modern Rural Creator, black long hair casually tied up with a wooden hairpin, wearing a dark blue comfortable linen outfit, clear makeup, focused and peaceful eyes.

[Shot Details]
[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Morning Harvest (The Freshness)
Visuals: High-definition close-up. Morning sunlight hits the plants with side backlighting.
Action: The Creator's bare hands (long, clean fingers) pick a bright red tomato with glistening dew drops from the vine.
Details: Extremely sharp focus, clearly showing the fuzz on the tomato surface and the trajectory of sliding water droplets. Background is blurred high-quality green.

[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Extreme Craftsmanship (The Craft)
Visuals: Indoor stove area, full of life but spotless.
Action: The Creator is cutting vegetables, movements are skilled and precise (non-performance nature).
Details: Macro lens captures the moment the knife blade slices through the ingredients, juice splattering. Then switches to the orange flame flickering in the earthen stove, light and shadow are warm and real.

[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Tranquil Time (The Moment)
Visuals: Full shot/Medium shot.
Action: A delicate home-cooked dish is placed on the wooden long table in the yard. The Creator sits down quietly, gently tidies a stray hair, and picks up a bite of food.
Atmosphere: Steam slowly rises against the backlight, the scene is so quiet you can almost hear the wind, showcasing the ultimate sense of relaxation modern people yearn for.
```

### No. 4: Live-Action Anime Adaptation: Water vs. Thunder Breathing Duel

![中文](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-中文-red)
![Featured](https://img.shields.io/badge/⭐-Featured-gold)

#### 📖 Description

A highly detailed, 15-second prompt for generating a live-action adaptation of an anime-style duel, featuring 'Water Breathing' (blue water dragon) versus 'Thunder Breathing' (golden lightning). The prompt specifies the style (Hollywood live-action, dark samurai, 4K, fast cuts), scene setting (misty forest under moonlight), and three distinct, action-packed shots detailing character actions, special effects, and the final collision of powers.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
Live-Action Anime Adaptation · Breathing Technique Decisive Battle (15 seconds · Super Burning Special Effects Version)
【Core Focus】: Water Breathing (Blue Water Dragon) VS Thunder Breathing (Golden Lightning), live-action extreme speed duel.

【Style】: Hollywood live-action anime adaptation film quality, dark samurai style, 4K ultra-clear, extreme fast cuts, explosive particle light effects, no gore.
【Duration】: 15 seconds
【Scene】: Misty forest under the moonlight, muddy ground, falling leaves.

[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Water Melody Prelude · Starting Stance (Sense of charging)
Visuals: A young samurai wearing a green and black checkered haori (jacket), lowering his center of gravity under the moonlight, gripping his sword with both hands.
Action: He takes a deep breath, and the surrounding air instantly solidifies. As he draws his sword, a giant blue water dragon, condensed from high-pressure water flow, appears out of thin air, rotating rapidly around his body and blade, emitting the roar of flowing water.
Special Effects Details: The water flow has a realistic sense of splashing, illuminating the dark forest.

[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Thunder Flash · Charge (Sense of extreme speed)
Visuals: The opponent, a blonde swordsman wearing a yellow triangular patterned haori, is crouched extremely low, adopting the posture of Iaijutsu (sword drawing technique).
Action: The ground suddenly explodes, and he instantly transforms into a dazzling golden lightning afterimage, refracting and charging through the forest in a "Z" shape at a speed undetectable by the naked eye.
Special Effects Details: Golden electric arcs and scorched fallen leaves remain in the places he passes.

[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Water and Thunder Collision · Final Sound (Ultimate move clash)
Visuals: Extreme speed collision. The young samurai swings the giant blue water dragon down to meet the attack, and the blonde swordsman, transformed into lightning, crashes into him head-on.
Action: The two swords violently collide in the center of the frame.
Special Effects Spectacle: The blue water dragon and the golden lightning instantly explode, forming a massive water-thunder energy storm that spreads outwards. The surrounding large trees are snapped in half by the energy wave, and mud and light obscure the camera. The scene ends in an extremely dazzling blue, yellow, and white light.
```

### No. 5: Seedance 2.0: 80-Year-Old Rapper MV

![中文](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-中文-red)
![Featured](https://img.shields.io/badge/⭐-Featured-gold)

#### 📖 Description

A detailed, 15-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 16:9 horizontal street rap music video (MV) featuring an 80-year-old woman. The prompt specifies the style (neon purple/blue cool tones, explosive atmosphere), character appearance (silver hair, leather jacket, hip-hop accessories), scene breakdown (0-3s intro, 3-7s rapping, 7-11s dancing, 11-15s climax/conclusion), specific Rap lyrics, camera techniques (low angle, 360-degree rotation, quick cuts), and sound design (Trap electronic music, heavy 808 drums).

#### 📝 Prompt

```
16:9 horizontal screen, street rap MV style, neon purple and blue cool tones, explosive cool and fierce atmosphere. 0-3 seconds: Medium shot push-in, city street night scene with flashing neon lights, an 80-year-old silver-haired woman stands in front of a graffiti wall, short silver-white hair styled in a neat slick-back, distinct square face contour, sword-like eyebrows slanting towards the temples, eyes sharp like electricity, wrinkles at the corners of her eyes like badges of time, a confident smile on the corner of her mouth, wearing a black leather jacket over a white printed T-shirt (large black letters "YOLO" on the chest) + black cargo pants + white high-top sneakers, a thick gold chain necklace around her neck, silver bracelet on her wrist, holding up a microphone with both hands, strong drum beats of the BGM start, the old woman's eyes sharpen, and her lips open to start Rap. 3-7 seconds: Medium shot + close-up switch, the old woman starts rapping, with an extremely strong sense of rhythm, her silver hair flying with her head-nodding movements, one hand holding the microphone, the other hand making gestures to match the rhythm—index finger pointing at the camera, palm cutting the rhythm up and down, making hip-hop gestures, movements are smooth and flowing, eyes sharp and looking directly at the camera, wrinkles vividly jumping with her expression, lips opening and closing rapidly to spit out lyrics: [Rap Lyrics] "Eighty-year-old legs, can jump better than you! Silver hair flowing, this is my pride! Don't call me old, my Flow is better than yours, when you were playing rap, I was listening to disco!" (Fast speed, strong rhythm, fierce attitude) Quick cuts: facial close-ups, hand movements, full-body swaying, side silhouettes, synchronized with the BGM beat. 7-11 seconds: Dance segment, the camera pulls back to show the full body, the old woman starts dancing—first the classic hip-hop bounce, then a neat street dance freeze, followed by a body wave transmitting from the shoulders to the toes, and then a quick footwork workout, movements are clean and sharp, silver hair flies under the neon lights, the leather jacket flutters in the air, she continues to Rap while dancing: [Rap Lyrics] "Legs and feet are nimble, speed is not slow, my lyrics are carved in time! You play with phones, I play with beats, eighty years of life, written into this verse!" (Faster rhythm, stronger tone) Low-angle upward shot + 360-degree surrounding shot, capturing the old woman's cool and fierce dance moves. 11-15 seconds: Climax ending, the old woman makes a cool turn, her silver hair arcs in the air, she faces the camera and makes a "shush" gesture with her finger, then her lips move closer to the microphone, singing the last line in a low, magnetic voice: [Reality Lyrics] "Time never defeats a beauty, I just changed the way I experience youth..." (Slow rhythm, deep emotion, lingering finish) The camera slowly pushes in for a close-up of the old woman's eyes, the wrinkles at the corners of her eyes are all stories, her gaze is still sharp yet with a hint of kindness, the BGM abruptly stops at the climax, the frame freezes on the old woman's cool yet slightly gentle smile, vignetting + neon purple light halo.
```

### No. 6: Cinematic Street Racing Sequence for Seedance 2

![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-English-blue)
![Featured](https://img.shields.io/badge/⭐-Featured-gold)

#### 📖 Description

A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for Seedance 2 to generate a cinematic street racing sequence at night, focusing on intense driver focus, dynamic camera work, and explosive acceleration, structured with specific time segments for scene progression.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
cinematic street racing sequence at night, a focused driver inside a high-performance car grips the steering wheel, intense eye focus, city lights reflecting on windshield, tension building before sudden acceleration

camera: rapid multi-angle system with seamless transitions, interior close-up → over-the-shoulder → exterior tracking → low ground shots, ultra dynamic camera movement, whip pans + speed ramp transitions + motion blur masking cuts, continuous flow illusion

(0-2s) interior close-up on driver, hand tightens on gear shift, subtle breathing, dashboard lights glowing
(2-4s) over-the-shoulder shot, road ahead stretching into neon-lit city, engine vibration building
(4-6s) extreme close-up on finger pressing NOS button, instant ignition reaction
(6-8s) explosive acceleration, camera snaps to exterior side tracking shot, car launches forward with violent speed surge
(8-10s) ultra low ground shot near asphalt, wheels spinning at extreme velocity, environment streaking past
(10-12s) high-speed chase through tight streets, sharp turns, camera whip pans between angles, reflections and light trails enhancing speed

Dense urban night environment, wet asphalt reflecting neon lights, tunnel passages, street lights streaking, high-speed city atmosphere
Ultra realistic, fast and furious inspired energy, photorealistic lighting, intense motion blur, high contrast neon reflections, cinematic depth of field, extreme sense of speed, fluid transitions, no distortion, no stretching
```

```
LOOK: The Bandra-Worli Sea Link at night in a raging monsoon, white cable stays lit against a black churning sea, traffic stranded on the deck; cold steel-blue grade slashed with amber sodium light, rain hammering the lens. 35mm anamorphic, heavy flare, IMAX-scale water simulation, 4K.

Shot 1 — A colossal deep-sea leviathan, barnacled and whale-vast, breaches beside the bridge and crashes through the outer cable stays mid-lunge; the cables snap taut around its body like a net and the whole span shudders, cars skidding sideways across the wet deck. Low angle from the deck craning up the breaching mass, speed-ramped at impact.

Shot 2 — Inside a hanging bus dangling half off the edge, a woman in a drenched office suit claws up the tilting aisle as the creature's eye — taller than the bus — slides past the cracked window, pupil contracting at her. Tight handheld inside the bus, Dutch-tilted, the eye filling the glass.

Shot 3 — The leviathan thrashes to tear free and only wraps itself deeper; cables shear off pylons and lash across the deck like whips, slicing a truck in half, while passengers sprint between strikes. Ground-tracking with the runners, whip-panning to each cable strike.

Shot 4 — It heaves its full weight seaward; the main pylon groans, folds — and the entire suspended span swings down over the creature's back, cables cinching as the bridge collapses onto it like a snare drawing closed. Bird's-eye directly above the folding span, geometry closing like a fist.

Shot 5 — The wreckage drags the shrieking leviathan under, one fluke hammering the surface before the cables haul it down; the woman hangs from the bus doorway on a severed stay, swinging above the boil. The bridge it attacked is what drowned it. Slow aerial pull-back: the broken Sea Link, the sinking glow, the city lights indifferent behind the rain.
```

Cut to him seated, posing for camera, doing dramatic “influencer hand gestures.”  Gondolier starts singing; Reggie reacts with faux sophistication, then genuine awe.  Pigeons swoop overhead; quick cut of Reggie ducking, then pretending it was planned.  Passing under a bridge, he tries to deliver a serious history fact and clearly gets it wrong.  POV shot looking up at old buildings; Reggie calls it “the world’s fanciest water maze.”  Gondola brushes another gondola; brief awkward overlap, Reggie throws in a cheeky compliment or British sarcasm.  Jump cut to Reggie at a small floating café/bar, balancing espresso on the edge.  Extreme close-up: Reggie sips espresso, eyes widen at the strength, yet he pretends it’s “absolutely delightful.”  Quick montage: mini bites of cicchetti, approving nods, then one dramatic overreaction to a strong flavour.  Sunset shot on a small bridge; Reggie leans on the railing, bowler slightly askew.  Final line to camera, something like “Ten out of ten, but still no idea where the roads went,” with a jaunty waddle away.
```

Style: Daylight vlog aesthetic, warm natural morning feel, muted beige and cream tones, gentle handheld rhythm.

[0-3s]

[3-7s]

Action: He pauses his scroll, double-taps the screen, and corners of his mouth lift into a small quiet smile.

[7-11s]

[11-15s]
Camera: Pull back to medium, he sets the phone down and picks up his pen to write in the notebook.
Action: He writes a quick note, glances back at the phone, then exhales and leans into his work.
Lighting: Warm window light, soft and clean.
Avoid: Jitter, identity drift, staged ad feel, overexposed window.

![日本語](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-日本語-green)

> A comprehensive prompt for creating a cinematic fusion video where 2D anime chibi characters interact naturally with real-world Tokyo cityscapes and magical effects.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
A world where chibi characters exist within real Tokyo streets, with 2D effects strongly fused into reality. The effects do not appear stuck to the screen but blend perfectly into the live-action space, light, and perspective, naturally appearing and changing in response to the character's movements and emotions. A refreshing, light, and slightly magical fusion video where reality, effects, and chibi characters become one.

The amount of effects is significantly increased and layered: 
- Colorful ribbon trails (pink, light blue, yellow, white, etc.) 
- Hand-drawn-style white lines, dotted lines, arcs, arrows, and orbital lines 
- Light sketch-style overlays and geometric shapes 
- Confetti, particles, and grains of light 
These exist in the depth of the live-action shot, appearing and changing in reaction to the character's movements.

Cut composition: 
Cut 1: She steps onto the sidewalk while rubbing her sleepy eyes. Colorful ribbon trails and white hand-drawn lines dance gently around her, and particles rise softly from her feet. The camera moves forward slowly.
Cut 2: As she walks leisurely, several ribbon trails naturally extend from her body and flow around her. Confetti and white orbital lines gently envelop her. Lateral tracking camera.
Cut 3: At the moment she yawns, gentle light particles and white arcs spread softly from her mouth. Hand-drawn-style symbols and small shapes float lightly around her face. Slow camera zoom-in.
Cut 4: When walking past shops or cars, ribbon trails pass through signs and cars as if tracing them gently. White dotted lines and arrows appear to emphasize her walking path. Lateral camera movement.
Cut 5: When she reaches out her hand in front of cherry blossoms in a park, the petals and colorful ribbon trails merge and soar high. Grains of light and hand-drawn arcs rotate gently around her. Slight camera zoom-in.
Cut 6: Walking while looking up at buildings. Long ribbon trails extend toward the sky along the height of the buildings, and white orbital lines and geometric shapes float in the blue sky. Gentle light particles dance from her body. Low-angle camera.
Cut 7: The moment she jumps softly over a puddle, splashes + colorful ribbon trails + white hand-drawn lines spread out widely. Particles and grains of light bounce and dance beautifully. Camera slightly pulls back.
Cut 8: Sitting on a bench at sunset. Ribbon trails and hand-drawn lines gently envelop her, and particles dance slowly as if melting into the sunset light. The camera moves horizontally slowly for a soft closing.

Overall, a world where real Tokyo scenery, chibi characters, and effects are strongly fused. The effects are not overly sci-fi but refreshing, light, and slightly poetic. The volume and movement of the effects are significantly increased to be dense in each cut, reacting firmly to the character's movements and emotions. The camera moves consistently in each cut.
```

```

Please turn the storyboard sequence into a fast-paced cooking video following the order of the scenes. ## Style: High-quality Japanese anime film style, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed food animation, shallow depth of field, soft natural summer lighting, macro close-up shots, slow cinematic camera movement, refreshing and bright summer atmosphere, gourmet cooking animation style with strong emphasis on texture and moisture. ## Editing: Use fast-paced, rhythm-driven cutting as the foundation, ensuring the cooking process is intuitively easy to understand. Apply match cuts (matching shape, motion, composition, and texture) to transition smoothly between scenes. The overall video should feel like an energetic and stylish anime film, with a strong focus on sizzle, freshness, and visual appeal. ### Scene 1 — Pounding and preparing the pork loin Close-up of anime-style hands gripping a wooden meat mallet, firmly pounding a thick pink pork loin cutlet on a wooden cutting board. The meat flattens slightly with each strike, fibers visibly loosening. Salt and pepper are sprinkled evenly across the surface. Subtle vibration ripples through the meat on impact. Hyperrealistic anime style, sharp kitchen lighting, cinematic shallow depth of field. ### Scene 2 — Coating with breadcrumbs Anime-style hands methodically coating a raw pork cutlet: first pressing it into a tray of white flour, then dipping it into beaten egg wash with golden drips falling back, finally pressing it firmly into a tray of coarse white panko breadcrumbs. Each layer adheres visibly. Hyperrealistic anime style, overhead dramatic lighting, close-up food detail. ### Scene 3 — Frying A panko-coated pork cutlet submerged in shimmering golden oil in a deep frying pan. Vigorous bubbles erupt around the edges, gradually settling as the crust turns deep amber and crispy. Light refracts through the hot oil surface. Steam rises gently. Hyperrealistic anime style, warm golden lighting, cinematic. ### Scene 4 — Slicing the fried cutlet A perfectly fried golden-brown tonkatsu rests on a wooden cutting board. Anime-style hands guide a large sharp knife, slicing the cutlet into even uniform strips. The crispy crust cracks cleanly with each cut, revealing tender white meat inside. Subtle steam escapes the cuts. Hyperrealistic anime style, dramatic top-angle kitchen lighting. ### Scene 5 — Simmering dashi and onions Inside a wide shallow pan on a gas stove, thinly sliced onion rings simmer slowly in dashi broth. The onions gradually soften and turn translucent, gently swaying in the amber liquid. Bubbles rise steadily from the bottom. Chopsticks occasionally stir the onions. Warm steam drifts upward. Hyperrealistic anime style, warm stovetop glow, cinematic close-up. ### Scene 6 — Placing the cutlet on the dashi Anime-style hands use chopsticks to carefully lay sliced tonkatsu strips side by side over the gently simmering onion and dashi broth in a shallow pan. The cutlet sizzles softly as it contacts the liquid. Golden breadcrumbs begin to absorb the broth slightly at the edges. Hyperrealistic anime style, warm amber kitchen lighting, close-up cinematic framing. ### Scene 7 — Pouring the beaten egg A slow, steady pour of beaten golden egg from a small bowl, spiraling gently over the simmering tonkatsu and onions in the pan. The egg cascades in a thin stream, spreading naturally across the surface, beginning to turn opaque at the edges where it meets heat. Hyperrealistic anime style, warm stovetop light, macro cinematic detail. ### Scene 8 — Egg slowly setting Inside the shallow pan over low heat, the poured egg slowly coagulates across the surface of the tonkatsu and onions. The edges firm into a soft golden custard while the center remains slightly runny and trembling. Gentle steam rises. No stirring — the egg sets naturally through residual heat. Hyperrealistic anime style, soft warm glow, intimate close-up framing. ### Scene 9 — Serving rice in a bowl A pristine white ceramic donburi bowl placed on a stainless steel counter. A rice paddle scoops a generous mound of steaming Japanese short-grain rice, placing it carefully into the bowl. The rice grains glisten slightly, tightly packed yet fluffy. Light steam rises from the surface. Hyperrealistic anime style, clean soft kitchen lighting, close-up cinematic. ### Scene 10 — Placing the cutlet and egg on the rice Anime-style hands use chopsticks to carefully slide the softly set egg-and-tonkatsu mixture from the pan directly onto the mound of white rice in the donburi bowl. The egg settles over the rice in a gentle wave. Broth seeps slightly into the rice at the edges. Steam rises from both layers. Hyperrealistic anime style, warm overhead lighting, close-up cinematic detail. ### Scene 11 — Egg glaze naturally settling The finished katsudon bowl rests still on the counter. The soft golden egg glaze slowly settles and spreads naturally over the tonkatsu strips and rice, pooling gently at the sides. The surface is lightly trembling, semi-set, glossy with broth. No hands visible — pure still life in motion. Hyperrealistic anime style, warm diffused lighting, slow cinematic push-in. ### Scene 12 — Presenting the finished katsudon A beautifully finished katsudon is presented in a traditional blue-and-white ceramic donburi bowl on a wooden surface. ### Urban Square Giant Vision Assembly

![日本語](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-日本語-green)

> A structured prompt for creating a dynamic 15-second video showing the high-speed assembly and lighting up of a giant digital billboard in a modern urban square.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
Title: Urban Square Giant Vision Assembly

1. [CONDITION DEFINITION] 
   Use 1 reference image. 1:1 square, 15 seconds. A giant square aurora vision screen is assembled from scratch in a high-speed montage in an empty space in a modern urban square. Surroundings include skyscrapers, urban architecture, and paved squares. Only the vision screen is constructed. Starts in bright daylight and transitions to night at completion. The reference image is used only as content within the screen.

2. [OPTIONAL PERFORMER LOOK] 
   No people as protagonists. If spectators are present, they are distant silhouettes at night. The focus is on construction, lighting, and the final display.

3. [SHOT / FLOW] 
   Starts at ground level looking at the empty square. The camera quickly ascends to a bird's-eye view for the montage. Steel frames, LED panels, and lighting equipment are assembled. LED panels light up partially in the middle, showing fragments of the reference image. Finally, the image is displayed clearly across the full screen at night.

4. [CAMERA / EDITING] 
   Dynamic camera movement: ground view, sudden bird's-eye view, low forward movement, and a final pull-back shot. 2-3 natural scene transitions within 15 seconds. Emphasize the satisfaction of the assembly montage and the day-to-night time change.

5. [SOUND] 
   No BGM. Sound effects only: metal assembly sounds, LED panel clicks, electronic power-up sounds, and ambient city noise. No dialogue or narration.

6. [NEGATIVE] 
   Do not place subjects from the reference image outside the screen. No horizontal ultra-wide screens. No logos, watermarks, or text labels. Avoid dark, dull colors or low contrast.
```

Realistic unprocessed iPhone handheld video footage style, all camera settings automatic, no post-color grading or effects. Features real handheld micro-shaking and the operator's (male) breathing, with natural lens dipping or tilting due to subway train movement before quickly correcting. Autofocus occasionally searches, lags, or briefly loses focus, especially during body or hand movements. Auto white balance shifts naturally between cool and warm tones with cabin fluorescent lights and tunnel lighting. Overall flat image, preserving real lens flare, slight edge chromatic aberration, and motion blur flaws. Simulates CCD sensor effects with slight vertical smear, color bleed, grain noise, and purple/green fringes on high-contrast edges. Only uses in-camera natural ambient sound: low subway rumble, wheel-rail friction, passenger whispers, and clothing rustle; microphone may slightly distort during acceleration or large movements. First-person POV from a seated male's perspective (starting from a low-angle upward gaze), camera movement following the male's instinctive reactions. Extremely crowded cabin with no empty seats, background filled with passengers and blurred crowds for realism. Occasionally visible male leg, knee, or hand edge for position context. 15-second timeline: (Sequence: normal distance → female flirtatiously approaches chest but never touches → male endures then yields + surprised expression → female takes seat and laughs, removes mask → male tries to touch shoulder, female uses sanitizer): 0s: Camera from low seated POV tilts up toward a young Asian female wearing a white mask, holding a strap, looking at the male. No empty seats. Normal distance. Male notices, female's eyes crinkle playfully, she slowly approaches the camera in a flirtatious rhythm (chest gets close but maintains safety distance). Autofocus locks on her upper body; slight overexposure, CCD grain and color bleed visible. 1-4s: Female continues slow approach, chest distance within 20cm but never touches. Male endures (micro-shaking reflects stiffness, low gaze causes brief lens dip). Autofocus searches then pulls back; CCD vertical smear visible. Clothing rustle and male's suppressed breathing/heartbeat audible. Train swaying tilts the frame. 5-7s: Male yields: POV rises and shakes (standing up hurriedly), moves right to pull away. Female smoothly sits in his vacated seat (seen from side-back POV). Overcrowded environment makes the seat-taking impactful. White balance drifts slightly; frame underexposes then compensates. 8-10s: Reversal detail: Male turns back awkwardly (POV); female smiles brilliantly under the mask. Male reaches out to touch her shoulder asking 'Why did you take my seat?'. Female laughs, leans back, eyes playful, takes out a white spray sanitizer and sprays his hand twice (spray sound and mist visible). Autofocus lag during hand movement. 11-13s: Female smiles more clearly, shakes head playfully. Flirtatious reversal. Around 12s, she slowly removes the mask, revealing a delicate face and full smile. Male turns back a second time (natural turn). Lens shaking and breathing continue. Light flare and CCD fringes. Girl's bell-like laughter audible over track rumble. 14-15s: Smile fades slightly to a playful smirk. Male looks at his cleaned hand. Camera dips then rises (weight shift). Slight framing imperfections. Consistent raw handheld video texture. All camera behaviors mimic iPhone physical characteristics, perfectly recreating the low-angle POV interaction.
```

### Street Soccer Bicycle Kick Action Sequence

![中文](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-中文-red)

> A comprehensive video generation prompt for a high-intensity street soccer match, featuring complex dribbling moves and a cinematic bicycle kick finish.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
Reference: Main Character: Use a character card persona. The protagonist is a street soccer expert, driving the ball forward with a low center of gravity, focused and confident eyes, agile and explosive movements, and clean footwork. The protagonist is always the core of the scene.

Other Players: There are multiple defenders on the field, not just one. Defenders press from different directions—some blocking from the side, some intercepting from the front, and some chasing from behind. Every defender's movement mimics real soccer play: lunging for a tackle, turning to chase, sudden stops, losing balance, and looking back to chase after being dribbled past.

Action Sequence:
0-3 seconds: The protagonist starts dribbling in the mid-front field, advancing rapidly with a low stance. The first defender comes from the front to steal the ball; the protagonist uses the inside of the foot to flick the ball and a body feint to bypass them. The soccer ball stays close to the feet, rolling clearly.
3-6 seconds: The second and third defenders pin from both sides. The protagonist performs consecutive step-overs, drag-back turns, and outside-foot direction changes, with the ball switching quickly between feet, passing through the gap. The two defenders are shaken off—one stalls out of position, the other turns to chase.
6-9 seconds: The protagonist continues advancing at high speed, and a fourth defender lunges from the side. The protagonist deftly chips the ball over the defender's foot, the ball bouncing briefly over the foot before landing back in front of the protagonist. The protagonist accelerates to catch up, as the crowd on the sidelines starts to gasp audibly.
9-11 seconds: Approaching the penalty area or small goal, the last defender and the goalkeeper press up simultaneously. The protagonist uses the toe to flick the ball into the mid-air, with it spinning clearly in front and above. The protagonist adjusts their steps, preparing for a bicycle kick.
11-14 seconds: The protagonist leaps backward into the air, completing a full bicycle kick. The action must be clear, powerful, and realistic: back leaning backward, legs performing a scissor-kick motion, one leg accurately striking the airborne ball while the other maintains balance. The kicked ball flies into the goal at high speed, passing between the defender and the goalkeeper, with the net shaking visibly.
14-15 seconds: After landing, the protagonist maintains a cool pose; the crowd erupts in cheers, and the defenders and goalkeeper turn to look at the goal with shocked reactions. The crowd can jump, raise hands, and shout, but do not swarm the protagonist. The final shot freezes on the impactful moment after the goal.

Cinematography: Handheld vertical follow shot of the protagonist's advance. Start with a medium shot from the sidelines; during the breakthrough, the camera follows the protagonist laterally and forward, with realistic hand shake and motion blur. When passing multiple people, keep the protagonist and the ball at the center of the frame. During the bicycle kick, the camera naturally tilts up to ensure a clear view of the protagonist airborne, striking the ball, and the ball entering the net. No jump cuts, no multi-camera setups, no drones, no gimbals.

Sound: Sounds of the ball rolling and friction with the ground, rapid footsteps of sneakers, defenders' sudden stops and chasing sounds, and the rising gasps from the spectators. The shouting gets louder as the protagonist bypasses people consecutively, with a crisp and powerful striking sound during the bicycle kick, followed by the net vibration and a global eruption of cheers after the goal.

Visual Focus: The protagonist consecutively dribbling past multiple defenders, with the ball always clearly visible, ending with a bicycle kick goal. Movements should mimic real soccer offense: dribbling, direction changes, shaking off opponents, chipping the ball, and shooting. Do not make it a 1-on-1 duel, do not have everyone standing still, and do not have defenders just posing.
```

Distant Jakarta-style skyline bokeh dominates the background with deep blues and purples, contrasting against the warm 2700K string lights.

The 30-year-old Indonesian chef is joined by two close friends (a male and a female companion in casual, stylish weekend wear). They exhibit relaxed, genuine laughter, natural eye contact, and authentic body language.

Scene 3 (7.5s–11.5s) — Macro Taste Textures

> A Pixar-style 3D animation storyboard about a schoolboy hero who saves a girl's purse, featuring dynamic camera angles and cinematic lighting.

```
Style: High-end 3D animated cartoon, cinematic Pixar-style lighting, expressive characters, shallow depth of field, dynamic motion blur, viral short-form pacing, 4K

Scene 1 (0–3s) “Establish + Hook”
Wide tracking shot from behind: a cartoon school boy walks alone on a quiet street, backpack bouncing slightly.
Camera slowly pushes in (dolly-in). Subtle wind + soft suspense beat starts.
Transition: quick whip pan left into next scene.

Scene 2 (3–6s)  “Threat Reveal”
Snap zoom cut-in to a girl near a parked bike being threatened by two sneaky snatchers.
One grabs her purse aggressively.
Camera angle: low-angle wide shot to make snatchers look bigger and intense.
Music intensifies sharply.
Transition: fast heartbeat zoom blur into hero reaction.

Scene 3 (6–9s) “Hero Moment Build”
Close-up on the boy’s face determined expression, eyes reflecting light.
He bends down (camera follows in slow-motion orbit shot) and picks up a small stone.
Cinematic slow-motion throw with motion blur and dramatic lighting flare.
Transition: impact cut (flash frame white)

Scene 4 (9–11s)  “Impact Chaos”
Stone hits the bike with stylized spark FX + metallic clang sound vibe.
Camera shakes slightly (handheld effect).
Purse falls in slow motion.
Snatchers react in exaggerated cartoon shock.
Transition: speed ramp + forward push-in tracking shot

Scene 5 (11–13s) “Action Resolution”
The boy runs in smooth tracking side-shot (parallax motion), grabs the purse mid-motion.
He steps in front of the girl protectively.
Snatchers retreat in exaggerated cartoon panic (blurred background motion).
Transition: soft stabilized slow fade motion

Scene 6 (13–15s)  “Hero Ending / Viral Hook Finish”
Golden warm lighting.
Medium close-up: boy returns purse gently. Girl smiles relieved.
Camera slowly rotates around them (hero orbit shot).
He puts on black sunglasses inslow-motion swag reveal.
Soft romantic outro music fades.
Final frame freezes for 0.5s (TikTok-style end lock).

### Pixar-Style 3D Animated Comedy Short

![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-English-blue)

> A detailed prompt for creating a Pixar-inspired 3D animated short film featuring a mysterious package and an absurd unboxing sequence.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
Create a Pixar-inspired 3D animated comedy short called "The Package."
A curious young man receives a mysterious cardboard package at his front door. There is no sender, no return address, and no explanation. He brings it inside. Suddenly, the package starts making strange tapping sounds. Close-ups, suspenseful music, dramatic lighting.
The noises grow louder. Neighbors become concerned. Rumors spread. Crowds gather outside. News reporters arrive. Emergency vehicles appear. Experts investigate. The situation escalates into a city-wide spectacle. Fast-paced comedic montage, cinematic camera movements, exaggerated reactions.
Unable to ignore the mystery, the man finally decides to open the package. Everyone watches in complete silence. Inside is another smaller box. He opens it.
Another box.
And another.
And another.
The sequence becomes increasingly absurd as dozens of boxes are revealed one inside another. The crowd becomes more invested with every opening. Suspense reaches maximum tension.
Finally, the tiniest box contains a folded note.
Close-up.
The note reads:
"Congratulations. You just got UNBOXED."
Confused, the man looks around. Then notices a hidden camera. His best friend steps out laughing. The crowd erupts in laughter. The man facepalms before eventually laughing too.
Final cinematic wide shot of friends and neighbors laughing together as the tower of empty boxes surrounds them.
On-screen text:
"Sometimes the biggest surprises are the ones that make you laugh the most."
Pixar-style 3D animation, mystery-comedy tone, expressive acting, cinematic suspense, smooth transitions, playful storytelling, dramatic build-up with humorous payoff, high-end animated short film quality, vibrant colors, 16:9.
```

### Chaotic Pizza Delivery Animated Short

![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-English-blue)

> A Pixar-style animated story about a rookie pizza delivery boy who accidentally wins a race while facing various obstacles.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
A rookie pizza delivery boy receives an urgent order and rushes through a vibrant city on his scooter. Already running late, he is determined to deliver the pizza on time. But the day quickly turns into chaos. A sudden storm floods the streets, traffic blocks every shortcut, and an angry bulldog starts chasing him through the city.

Trying to escape, he accidentally rides into a bicycle race, gets swept into a city marathon, and then crashes into a colorful parade. Every obstacle somehow pushes him forward instead of slowing him down. The bulldog keeps chasing him, the crowds keep cheering, and the delivery boy has no idea that people now think he's competing in a major race.

The chaos grows bigger and bigger as he runs through packed streets, cheering spectators, and city landmarks. Still holding the pizza, he unknowingly takes the lead and sprints toward the finish line. Confetti cannons explode as he crosses first place. The crowd goes wild. Reporters surround him. He is handed a giant trophy and celebrated as a champion.

Proud of his victory, he rushes to complete the delivery. He finally arrives at the customer's door, exhausted but smiling, and proudly hands over the pizza.

The customer checks the receipt, looks up, and casually says:

"I ordered this yesterday."

The delivery boy freezes in shock. The bulldog finally catches up and sits happily beside him. The crowd laughs, the trophy feels meaningless, and all that chaos was for a pizza that was already a day late.

Pixar-inspired 3D animation, cinematic storytelling, expressive character acting, slapstick comedy, dynamic camera movements, vibrant city environments, smooth scene transitions, emotional humor, colorful lighting, high-end animated short film quality, 16 :9.
```

The anime girl has brown hair with a yellow headband/ribbon, big expressive eyes, and is wearing a classic blue and white cheerleader outfit with a short pleated blue skirt. She holds bright yellow pom-poms and is energetically animated in smooth 2D anime style — cheering loudly, raising her arms high, shaking the pom-poms vigorously, bouncing on her feet, and opening and closing her mouth as if yelling cheers with an excited, over-the-top expression. Her movements are lively and loop naturally while the rest of the scene has realistic but heavily degraded video quality.
The man is focused on his computer screen, occasionally typing on the keyboard or moving the mouse with one hand while slightly turning his head. His facial expressions and movements feel natural but captured in low-quality home video style. The room has dim indoor lighting from a desk lamp or overhead bulb, creating soft shadows and that authentic early 2010s camcorder look. Slight handheld camera shake or static tripod shot. Overall atmosphere is nostalgic, slightly cringy, and meme-like — exactly like a video someone would have filmed and uploaded to YouTube or Reddit in 2010s if it was around. 
Ultra-detailed textures on skin, clothing, and the cluttered desk, but all filtered through heavy 2010s low-res video degradation. Cinematic yet deliberately cheap and authentic early 2010s home video aesthetic.

Girl cheers him on and he replies. Their banter is funny, wierd and creepy at the same time.

> A complex script for a continuous, locked-off shot featuring a gamer and a supportive anime character with full audio cues.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
Create one continuous locked-off wide shot inside a cluttered high-rise gaming apartment at night. Keep the camera completely stationary for the entire scene: no cuts, zooms, pans, tilts, shake, reframing, or angle changes.
The seated adult man remains focused on playing a computer game. He makes natural mouse movements, taps the keyboard, leans slightly toward the monitor, and reacts subtly to tense gameplay. He stays fully clothed, never speaks, and does not turn around.
Behind him stands a clearly adult anime woman, age 22 or older, wearing modest casual gaming-themed clothing. She has a bright, friendly expression and a clean 2D cel-shaded anime appearance. Her behavior is supportive and playful, with no flirting, romance, physical contact, or suggestive movement.
[00:00–00:03]
The man begins clicking the mouse and tapping the keyboard. The anime woman bounces lightly in place and makes two small fist pumps near shoulder height. She cheers in a cheerful adult Japanese anime voice:
「がんばれ！ がんばれー！」
“Ganbare! Ganbareee!”
[00:03–00:06]
The man leans closer to the monitor as the game becomes more intense. She performs two simple side steps, claps twice, and says:
「その調子！ もう少し！」
“Sono choushi! Mou sukoshi!”
[00:06–00:09]
The man makes a quick mouse movement and presses several keys. She raises both arms in a harmless victory pose, waves once, and cheers:
「がんばって！ 负けないで！」
“Ganbatte! Makenaide!”
[00:09–00:12]
The man remains concentrated while the monitor glow flickers naturally across the desk. She alternates two small fist pumps, gives a thumbs-up, and says:
「いけるよ！ いける！」
“Ikeru yo! Ikeru!”
[00:12–00:15]
The man completes a final rapid series of clicks and relaxes slightly, suggesting success. She makes one small celebratory hop, lands naturally, claps, and finishes with both thumbs up while saying:
「やったー！ よくできました！」
“Yattaa! Yoku dekimashita!”

Clear adult feminine Japanese voice with accurate lip sync. Add realistic keyboard tapping, mouse clicks, computer-fan hum, faint game sounds, quiet room tone, and distant city ambience. No music and no additional voices.

Photorealistic apartment combined with a crisp 2D adult anime character. Warm room lighting, cool monitor glow, red computer lighting, natural shadows, light cinematic grain, wholesome gaming-comedy atmosphere.
AVOID:
No minors, childlike appearance, romance, flirting, physical contact, sexualized clothing, suggestive dancing, camera movement, subtitles, captions, speech bubbles, watermarks, extra characters, duplicated limbs, distorted hands, facial changes, clothing changes, room changes, character flicker, or transformation into a realistic person.

### Anime Comedy Chaos Video Prompt

![中文](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-中文-red)

> A detailed multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to create a 15-second anime-style short film featuring a girl and her cat, transitioning from a peaceful morning to chaotic comedy.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
SEEDANCE 2 - 15-second Anime Chaos Short Film
Style: Japanese healing anime, soft cinematic lighting, cel-shading, exaggerated comedic performance, warm daily atmosphere, dynamic shots, comfortable home feel, high-quality animated movie style, macaron color palette, ultra-exquisite line art.

Format: 16:9 Anime Cinematic Aspect Ratio
Duration: 15 seconds
Frame Rate: 24fps
Camera Style: Handheld anime camera work + comedic high-speed push-pull shots
Emotional Pace: Calm → Chaos → Comedic → Warm Conclusion

Shot 1 (0s-2s)
Medium wide shot. A white-haired girl sits cross-legged on the room floor, gently teasing an orange and white cat with a pink feather wand. Warm sunset light pours through the window. The cat quietly stares at the feather as if calculating how to destroy the entire living room. The camera slowly pushes in.

Shot 2 (2s-4s)
Sudden burst of action. The cat leaps at high speed, instantly rushing into the air, knocking over books, flower pots, and snack bags. Ultra-exaggerated fisheye lens effect. Objects fly through the air with anime motion blur. The girl is shocked and stops moving. Fast whip pan camera movement.

Shot 3 (4s-6s)
Low angle chaotic shot. The entire room falls into disaster. Throw pillows, papers, and toys scatter in the air, the cat bouncing frantically between furniture like an orange missile. Exaggerated anime impact lines appear in the background. The girl screams in breakdown.

Shot 4 (6s-8s)
The air suddenly goes quiet. The girl stands in the middle of the messy room with hands on hips, staring down at the cat. The cat sits upright, pretending nothing happened. Tiny dust particles float in the air, the sunset light is soft. Camera slowly zooms in to create comedic pressure.

Shot 5 (8s-10s)
Close-up two-shot. The girl squats down to seriously lecture the cat, gently poking it with her finger. The cat blinks innocently with no remorse. The image has slight handheld shake and anime comedic bubble effects.

Shot 6 (10s-12s)
The girl takes out cat snacks. The cat instantly enters excitement mode, its pupils turning into star shapes. The camera pushes in fast on the snack bag. Background switches to colored speed lines and flash effects.

Shot 7 (12s-13.5s)
Ultra-dynamic close-up. The cat pounces towards the camera at an absurd speed. The snack bag shakes violently. Exaggerated stretch animation effect. The screen is filled with star flashes and anime energy explosion effects.

Shot 8 (13.5s-15s)
Rooftop sunset ending. The girl sits on the edge of a city rooftop holding the cat. Distant city lights turn on, the sky is a purple-orange gradient sunset. A gentle breeze blows the girl's coat. The cat nestles quietly in her arms, purring. Camera slowly pulls back, ending warmly.

Negative Prompts:
Low quality, realistic style, 3D modeling feel, horror atmosphere, dark style, extra limbs, blurry eyes, collapsed face, stiff movement, ugly expressions, watermark, text errors, low resolution.

Sound Design:
Soft Lo-fi music opening → exaggerated percussion sound effects during chaos → comedic pause/silence → ending with warm piano melody.

Transition Styles:
Quick whip pan, anime freeze frame, exaggerated push shot, comedic hard cut, cinematic fade out at the end.

Keyword Reinforcement:
Anime movie quality, Kyoto Animation style, warm chaotic feeling, cute cat daily life, high-expressivity character acting, cinematic anime composition, light comedic short, healing animation atmosphere.
```

The bowler runs in and delivers a fast ball. The batsman attempts a massive six, swinging with full power. But at the moment of impact, he completely loses grip of the bat.

The crowd gasps, then bursts into laughter.

Replay immediately cuts in from multiple angles showing the bat flying farther than the ball.

The non-striker bends over laughing.

Crowd chants and cheers as the batsman awkwardly smiles and rubs the back of his neck.

### Dubai CEO Short Drama with Cat Twist

![中文](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-中文-red)

> A highly detailed storyboard prompt for a 15-second cinematic short drama featuring a Dubai CEO and a humorous ending with an orange cat and a paper bag.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
A 15-second high-viral-potential CEO short drama with cinematic narrative. Set in a luxurious Dubai five-star hotel ballroom with massive crystal chandeliers, a red-carpet stage, epic dramatic score, and intense emotional swings. Professional camera work, fast editing, shallow depth of field, lens breathing, ultra-realistic facial expressions, and a high-contrast humorous ending.

0.0-0.8s: High-speed aerial shot diving into the luxury hotel conference hall with hundreds of elegantly dressed guests. Centered on stage, a handsome CEO in a deep blue bespoke suit gives a speech. A giant LED screen behind him shows a glittering Dubai night view and the word "Celebration" in red. Epic orchestral music starts.

0.8-1.6s: Low-angle hero shot orbiting the CEO. He speaks confidently while the audience applauds and camera flashes go off.

1.6-2.4s: Extreme close-up. The CEO suddenly frowns, the sound of a heartbeat intensifies, and sweat appears on his forehead.

2.4-3.2s: Dramatic zoom-in. Breathing becomes rapid, and a ringing sound effect begins.

3.2-4.0s: POV shot. Guests' faces blur and distort as the screen rotates slightly in a dizzying effect.

4.0-4.8s: CEO stumbles in slow motion, dropping his speech notes.

4.8-5.6s: A beautiful female emcee in a white diamond-studded evening gown rushes onto the stage. High-speed tracking shot.

5.6-6.4s: The emcee catches the fainting CEO. Soft backlighting. She smiles and says: "Are you okay?"

6.4-7.2s: The pale, weak CEO leans on her shoulder and whispers: "Am I having a heart attack?"

7.2-8.0s: The emcee winks mysteriously to the side. Music stops abruptly.

8.0-8.8s: An orange cat wearing a grey robe and holding a yellow paper bag rushes in from off-camera. Cinematic slider tracking shot.

8.8-9.6s: The orange cat snaps the bag open and places it over the CEO's face. The audience is shocked.

9.6-10.4s: The cat holds the bag with both paws and shouts: "Slow down and breathe!"

10.4-11.2s: The CEO breathes slowly through the bag. Heartbeat returns to normal. Visuals stabilize.

11.2-12.0s: The CEO stands back up on the podium, energized. Heroic orbiting shot.

12.0-12.8s: He looks affectionately at the emcee and announces: "I'm going to make her my wife!"

12.8-13.8s: The crowd goes wild. The cat and guests cheer enthusiastically. Confetti explodes. Music reaches its climax.

13.8-15.0s: Close-up of the emcee. She turns mysteriously toward the camera, gives a playful smile and winks. Screen freezes with a cinematic end-sound. Traditional Chinese subtitle: "Sometimes, all you need is a paper bag." High-contrast comedy ending.
```

Effects: A massive, intricate circular geometric grid (Inari-shrine style) unfolds instantly across the floor. Blue and white fox-fire (kitsunebi) erupts from the lines, swirling upward. Surrounding pebbles and dust disintegrate into glowing embers.
Atmosphere: Eerie, mystical, and intensely hot.
00:03–00:06 (Shikigami Manifestation · Kyubi Shadow Descent)
Camera: Low-angle tracking shot orbiting the character's silhouette.
Action: The character claps their hands together, fingers interlacing into a complex "Kitsune Seal" (mimicking a fox face with the fingers). Their body sways slightly, channeling the spiritual pressure.
Effects: From the blue flames behind them, nine massive, ethereal tails made of white mist and crimson sparks unfurl, tearing the air apart. A giant, spectral fox head with burning golden eyes manifests above, roaring silently as its spiritual pressure ripples through the environment.
00:06–00:09 (Possession Fusion · Phantom Armor Awakening)
Camera: Extreme close-up of the character's eyes → Fast zoom-out to a full-body spin.
Action: They cross their arms over their chest, pulling the spiritual tails inward. The fox phantom collapses into their body. The character gasps, back arching as a shockwave of blue fire blasts outward.
Effects: The character's traditional haori sleeve shreds away, replaced by crimson-and-white spectral armor plates wrapping around their shoulders and forearms. White fox ears manifest from their hair, and their eyes glow with a piercing, predatory yellow slit.
00:09–00:12 (Final Transformation · Great Bow Manifestation)
Camera: Side-profile slow-motion tracking shot.
Action: Extending a single hand forward, a massive, ornate Japanese longbow (Yumi) woven from solid blue flame and white spirit-wood materializes in their grip. They grab the string, pulling it back to their cheek in a flawless, traditional archery stance, body low and stable.
Effects: As the bowstring is drawn, a crystalline, burning blue arrow manifests. Wisps of white fox-fire spiral around the arrow tip, distorting the air with heat.
00:12–00:15 (Preparation Complete · Sure-Kill Stance)
Camera: 360-degree dynamic orbit centering on the glowing arrow tip → Snap-focus to the character’s sharp, locked-in gaze.
Action: Holding the draw, the character breathes out a visible puff of blue mist. The ground beneath their feet cracks from the concentrated spiritual weight.
Atmosphere: Absolute focus, lethal tension, ready to pierce the heavens.
```

### Futuristic Gaming Laptop Commercial

![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-English-blue)

> A high-end commercial prompt for a gaming laptop that assembles from liquid-metal fragments and displays exploding gaming worlds.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
A futuristic black void illuminated by glowing blue energy. Sleek liquid-metal fragments float in the air and rapidly assemble themselves into a next-generation gaming laptop. Precision-engineered components snap perfectly into place as the laptop unfolds dramatically with mechanical elegance. Extreme close-ups showcase premium metal textures, RGB lighting, and ultra-thin design.

As the screen powers on, a burst of energy erupts outward. Epic gaming worlds explode from the display into reality: a futuristic cyberpunk city with neon lights, a medieval dragon soaring through the air, and a high-speed racing car drifting through glowing streets. The camera flies seamlessly through these worlds as particles, explosions, and visual effects surround the laptop.

In the final seconds, the gaming worlds collapse back into the screen. The laptop rotates slowly in a premium hero shot against a dark reflective environment. RGB keyboard glows intensely, cooling vents emit subtle energy effects, and cinematic light sweeps across the chassis. Product centered, ultra-premium presentation, dramatic reflections, sharp details, luxury technology aesthetic, powerful performance showcase, commercial-quality visuals, masterpiece product cinematography.
```

### Phoenix Transformation Sequence

![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-English-blue)

> A comprehensive prompt for a 15-second cinematic fantasy sequence showing a warrior transforming into a phoenix at sunrise.

#### 📝 Prompt

```
15-second ultra-cinematic fantasy transformation sequence atop a ruined cliff temple during sunrise.

A lone warrior stands at the edge of an ancient stone platform overlooking a sea of clouds. The first rays of sunlight break across the horizon while wind moves through torn banners and scattered ruins.

The camera slowly circles around the warrior as tiny golden embers begin appearing in the air. Warm light pulses beneath the skin like a second heartbeat awakening.

The embers multiply rapidly. Streams of living fire spiral around the warrior's body without causing harm. Golden-orange energy flows through glowing cracks beneath the skin.

The transformation begins. Fiery feather patterns emerge along the arms, shoulders, and face. Hair becomes strands of living flame moving gracefully in the wind.

The camera pushes closer as magnificent wings of fire start forming behind the warrior. Thousands of glowing feathers materialize from swirling embers and solar energy.

The transformation accelerates. The warrior rises slowly into the air while the surrounding ruins are illuminated by waves of radiant light. Burning feathers drift across the sky like glowing leaves.

At the climax, the body dissolves into a storm of fire feathers and solar particles. A colossal phoenix silhouette forms within the explosion of light.

The warrior is reborn as a Phoenix Avatar, surrounded by immense wings of living fire stretching across the horizon. Every wingbeat releases waves of glowing feathers into the clouds below.

Final cinematic moment: the Phoenix Avatar launches upward through the sunrise sky while a gigantic celestial phoenix made of flame briefly appears behind them, filling the heavens with golden light.

Style: ultra cinematic fantasy realism, divine phoenix transformation, living fire effects, feather particle simulation, sunrise atmosphere, mythological scale, celestial energy, dramatic aerial cinematography, AAA fantasy film quality, no text, no overlays.

Audio: epic cinematic fantasy score, celestial choir, soaring strings, powerful percussion, ember crackling, divine energy resonance, wind, and majestic phoenix calls.
```
